cases.prompt: write a README for this repo
expectations: Uses the README structure (Overview / Quick Start / Usage / Configuration / Contributing)
Classifies as Diataxis 'reference' or 'how-to' before writing

cases.prompt: draft an ADR for our choice to use PostgreSQL over MongoDB
expectations: Uses the ADR format (Title / Status / Context / Decision / Consequences)

cases.description: API docs request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: generate OpenAPI reference for our user service endpoints
expectations: Produces endpoint docs with method, path, parameters, request/response schemas, and working examples

cases.description: Branded PDF report does NOT trigger project-documentation
cases.prompt: build a branded PDF report for the client board
expectations: Routes to codi-content-factory instead (branded business docs live there)
Does NOT produce plain Markdown as the primary deliverable

cases.description: Codi self-docs do NOT trigger project-documentation
expectations: Does NOT treat Codi's own docs/ as consumer-project documentation
